Class JmlFacade

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml.JmlFacade
public final class JmlFacade extends Object
This facade provides facilities for the creation of lexer and parser of JML. It is the programatically frontend for the JMLLexer.g4 and JMLParser.g4. This class is rather a thin layer upon ANTLR4.

As a normal KeY developer you should rather JmlIO. JmlIO provides a translation from strings into KeY constructs.

See Also:
  • JmlIO

  • Method Details

    • createLexer

      public static @NonNull JmlLexer createLexer(@NonNull CharStream stream)
      Creates an JML lexer for the give stream.

    • createLexer

      public static @NonNull JmlLexer createLexer(@NonNull PositionedString ps)
      Creates a JML lexer for the given string with position. The position information of the lexer is changed accordingly.

    • createLexer

      public static @NonNull JmlLexer createLexer(@NonNull String content)
      Creates a JML lexer for a given string.

    • parseExpr

      public static @NonNull ParserRuleContext parseExpr(@NonNull PositionedString expr)
      Parse the given string as an JML expr. Position information are updated accordingly to the position given with the string.

    • parseExpr

      public static ParserRuleContext parseExpr(String expr)
      Parse the given string as an JML expr.

    • createParser

      public static @NonNull JmlParser createParser(@NonNull JmlLexer lexer)
      Create a JML parser for a given lexer. This method adds a exception-throwing error listeners to the parser.
      See Also:
      • SyntaxErrorReporter

    • parseClause

      public static @NonNull ParserRuleContext parseClause(@NonNull String content)
      Parses a given clause, like ensures or requires and returns a parse tree.
